title: Demon Slayer: The Hinokami Chronicles 2 Game Adds Infinity Castle Shinobu on April 17
content: Sega announced on Monday in a new trailer for Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba- The Hinokami Chronicles 2 , the sequel game to the 2021 Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - The Hinokami Chronicles game, that it will add the sixth DLC character for the "Infinity Castle Part 1 Character Pass," the Infinity Castle version of…
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll Manga Adds Blooming Love, Hinomaru Sumo, Diamond in the Rough, More Titles from Shueisha
content: Crunchyroll announced on Monday that it has added the following titles from Shueisha : • Abyss Rage • Alpi the Soul Sender • Arata Primal: The New Primitive • Blooming Love (pictured right) • Curtain's Up, I'm Off • Diamond in the Rough • Diasporaiser • Even If You Slit My Mouth • Excuse me dentist, it's touching me!
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll’s Darkest Spring 2026 Fantasy Finally Confirms It’s Fullmetal Alchemist’s True Successor
content: Fullmetal Alchemist is an anime that has emerged as one of the greatest ever created, a reputation solidified by fans who kept it at No. 1 on the popular anime site MyAnimeList for years.
author: ComicBook

title: Tokyopop Offers Public Stock Shares With Goal to Raise US$1.2 Million
content: In addition to seeking the maximum investment amount of about US$1.2 million, the company is pursuing up to US$50 million in annual revenue by 2030. The company currently earns about US$15 million annually. As of February 28, Tokyopop has an aggregate of approximately US$1,084,720 in cash and cash equivalents.
author: ANN

title: Early Release Date Announced for Bleach TYBW Final Part in New 3-Episode Theatrical Release Announcement
content: Bleach anime licensee VIZ Media announced on X (formerly Twitter) that Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War Final Part – The Calamity ‘s first three episodes will debut in U.S. theaters from June 25 to June 29. Both English sub and dub versions have been announced.
author: Anime Corner

title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity Anime's 1st 3 Episodes Get Early Screening in U.S. Theaters on June 25-29
content: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity will debut in July 2026 on TV Tokyo and its affiliates. Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War Part 3 - The Conflict premiered in October 2024 and concluded in a one-hour final episode in December that same year.
author: ANN

title: Bleach’s Final Season to Host Early Premiere in U.S. Theaters With Limited Event
content: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War is going big for its final season as it has announced it’s going to be hosting an early premiere for the final season with a special limited event across United States theaters.
author: ComicBook

title: Studio KAI Announces Insolvency Due to Deficit
content: The April 13 issue of the Japanese government's Kanpо̄ gazette revealed on Monday that Studio KAI animation studio is entering a state of insolvency, in which the company is unable to pay debts, after ending the 2025 fiscal year with a net loss of 565 million yen (approx. US$3.5 million).
author: ANN

title: One Piece Surprises Fans With The Boys Crossover
content: One Piece has truly taken over the world in the last few years, and that’s no more apparent than with its surprising crossover in the premiere episodes of The Boys ‘ fifth and final season.
author: ComicBook

title: More Lost Cartoon Network Classics Are Returning With New Release This Spring
content: It looks like more lost Cartoon Network classics are set to make their returns to streaming with a cool new release later this Spring according to a new listing spotted. It’s been a whirlwind of a time to be a Cartoon Network fan.
author: ComicBook
